Value.uax:XmlElement: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="640" version="1.2" width="640" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>HTML based table with footer.</desc> <title>Table</title> <metadata> <!-- ... mandatorys ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="30" desc="table header height" group="" name="header_height" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="14" desc="table header font size" group="" name="header_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="center; inherit" defaultvalue="inherit" desc="table header cell align horizontal" group="" name="header_text_horizontal" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="center; inherit" defaultvalue="center" desc="table header cell align vertical" group="" name="header_text_vertical" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="20" desc="table row height" group="" name="row_height" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table row font size" group="" name="row_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table detail font size" group="" name="detail_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table footer font size" group="" name="footer_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <!-- ... font ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvBorderColor" desc="global border colors" group="Appearance" name="globalBorderColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor" desc="global fill colors" group="Appearance" name="globalFillColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFontColor" desc="global font colors" group="Appearance" name="globalFontColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="global symbol colors" group="Appearance" name="globalSymbolColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvInactiveColor" desc="global inactive colors" group="Appearance" name="globalInactiveColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvObjectDisplays.Tables.ColorConfig" desc="global table colors" group="Appearance" name="globalColorConfig" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="atviseTheme" desc="custom theme" group="Appearance" name="theme_class" valuetype="string"/> <!-- ... options ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="columns reorderable" group="Options" name="columnReorder" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="paging" group="Options" name="paging" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="filter bar enabled" group="Options" name="filterBar" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter regular expressions" group="Options" name="filterRegExp" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter use placeholder" group="Options" name="filterStar" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter case sensitive" group="Options" name="filterCaseSensitive" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="1" desc="filter minimum length" group="Options" name="filterLength" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="1000" desc="filter delay [ms]" group="Options" name="filterDelay" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show runtime mode" group="Options" name="showMode" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="multiselect" group="Options" name="multiselect" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="multiselect on cell click" group="Options" name="multicellselect" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="cell linebreak" group="Options" name="linebreak" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="allow direct input" group="Options" name="allowDirectInput" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.keyboard.keyboard" desc="keyboard display" group="Options" name="keyboard" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.dialogs.message_board" desc="message board" group="Options" name="messageBoard" valuetype="display"/> <!-- menu --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenu" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="250" desc="menu width" group="Menu options" name="showMenuWidth" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="300" desc="menu height" group="Menu options" name="showMenuHeight" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show picker menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuPicker" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show filter menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuFilter" substitute="" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show export menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuExport" valuetype="bool"/> <!-- footer --> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol first page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-fast-backward"/>" name="fas_first_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol previous page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-step-backward"/>" name="fas_previous_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol pause" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-pause"></i>" name="fas_pause_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol stop page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-stop"/>" name="fas_stop_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol next page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-step-forward"/>" name="fas_next_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol last page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-fast-forward"/>" name="fas_last_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol load page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-download"/>" name="fas_load_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol search" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-search"/>" name="fas_search_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol truncate" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-ban"></i>" name="fas_truncate_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol triggered" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-angle-double-down"></i>" name="fas_triggered_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol continue" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-cog fa-spin"></i>" name="fas_continue_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol live" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-sync fa-spin"></i>" name="fas_live_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol done" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-check"></i>" name="fas_done_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol manually" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-download"></i>" name="fas_manually_icon"/> <!-- ... ende options ... --> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="false" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <svg atv:refpx="319.992" atv:refpy="307.029" height="580" id="id_1" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1.0586,0,0)" width="640" x="0" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.slickgrid.table_panel" y="0"> <atv:argument name="tableID" prefix="tableID"/> <atv:argument name="header_height" prefix="header_height"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_size" prefix="header_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="row_height" prefix="row_height"/> <atv:argument name="row_text_size" prefix="row_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_horizontal" prefix="header_text_horizontal"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_vertical" prefix="header_text_vertical"/> <atv:argument name="detail_text_size" prefix="detail_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="footer_text_size" prefix="footer_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="font_family" prefix="font_family"/> <atv:argument name="globalBorderColor" prefix="globalBorderColor"/> <atv:argument name="theme_class" prefix="theme_class"/> <atv:argument name="globalFillColor" prefix="globalFillColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalFontColor" prefix="globalFontColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalSymbolColor" prefix="globalSymbolColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalSymbolColor" prefix="globalInactiveColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalColorConfig" prefix="globalColorConfig"/> <atv:argument name="columnReorder" prefix="columnReorder"/> <atv:argument name="paging" prefix="paging"/> <atv:argument name="filterBar" prefix="filterBar"/> <atv:argument name="filterRegExp" prefix="filterRegExp"/> <atv:argument name="filterStar" prefix="filterStar"/> <atv:argument name="filterCaseSensitive" prefix="filterCaseSensitive"/> <atv:argument name="filterLength" prefix="filterLength"/> <atv:argument name="filterDelay" prefix="filterDelay"/> <atv:argument name="linebreak" prefix="linebreak"/> <atv:argument name="multiselect" prefix="multiselect"/> <atv:argument name="multicellselect" prefix="multicellselect"/> <atv:argument name="showMenu" prefix="showMenu"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuWidth" prefix="showMenuWidth"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuHeight" prefix="showMenuHeight"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuPicker" prefix="showMenuPicker"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuFilter" prefix="showMenuFilter"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuExport" prefix="showMenuExport"/> <atv:argument name="allowDirectInput" prefix="allowDirectInput"/> <atv:argument name="keyboard" prefix="keyboard"/> <atv:argument name="messageBoard" prefix="messageBoard"/> <atv:overwrite height="565" id="id_1" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1.0265,0,0)"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="320" atv:refpy="627.5" height="25" id="id_2" width="640" x="0" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.slickgrid.table_footer" y="615"> <atv:argument name="tableID" prefix="tableID"/> <atv:argument name="fas_first_page" prefix="fas_first_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_previous_page" prefix="fas_previous_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_pause_page" prefix="fas_pause_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_stop_page" prefix="fas_stop_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_next_page" prefix="fas_next_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_last_page" prefix="fas_last_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_load_page" prefix="fas_load_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_search_page" prefix="fas_search_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_truncate_icon" prefix="fas_truncate_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_triggered_icon" prefix="fas_triggered_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_continue_icon" prefix="fas_continue_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_live_icon" prefix="fas_live_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_done_icon" prefix="fas_done_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_manually_icon" prefix="fas_manually_icon"/> </svg> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>Enables SVG keyboard for the HTML table.</desc> <title>SVG Keyboard (table extension)</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="font size" group="Appearance" name="font_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="font color" group="Appearance" name="color" substitute="$COLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="allow direct input" group="Options" name="allowDirectInput" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.keyboard.keyboard" desc="keyboard display" group="Options" name="keyboard" valuetype="address"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="5" width="5"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="1" width="1"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="40" atv:refpy="13" fill="#ffffff" height="18" id="id_8" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1" width="78" x="1" y="1"/> <text atv:refpx="47.98" atv:refpy="7.652" fill="$COLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_9" transform="matrix(0.9545,0,0,0.7826,0.7497,0.2174)" x="20.477" y="17">T{Keyboard}</text> <circle atv:refpx="12.189" atv:refpy="14.605" cx="10" cy="10" fill="none" id="id_1" r="6.478" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-width="1.044"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="16.76" fill="$COLOR$" height="2.147" id="id_3" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="12"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="13.973" fill="$COLOR$" height="6" id="id_4" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="5"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.DISPLAYSCRIPTS.slickgrid.table_keyboard" atv:name="table_keyboard" atv:type="text/ecmascript"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>Notification for HTML based table.</desc> <title>Button Table Notification</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="font size" group="Appearance" name="font_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="font color" group="Appearance" name="color" substitute="$COLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.dialogs.message_board" desc="message board" group="Options" name="messageBoard" valuetype="display"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="5" width="5"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="1" width="1"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="40" atv:refpy="13" fill="#ffffff" height="18" id="id_8" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1" width="78" x="1" y="1"/> <text atv:refpx="47.98" atv:refpy="7.652" fill="$COLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_9" transform="matrix(0.9545,0,0,0.7826,0.7273,0.2174)" x="20.5" y="17">T{Notification}</text> <circle atv:refpx="12.189" atv:refpy="14.605" cx="10" cy="10" fill="none" id="id_1" r="6.478" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-width="1.044"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="16.76" fill="$COLOR$" height="2.147" id="id_3" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="12"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="13.973" fill="$COLOR$" height="6" id="id_4" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="5"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.DISPLAYSCRIPTS.slickgrid.table_notification" atv:name="table_notification" atv:type="text/ecmascript"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="640" version="1.2" width="640" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>HTML based table with footer.</desc> <title>Table</title> <metadata> <!-- ... mandatorys ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="30" desc="table header height" group="" name="header_height" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="14" desc="table header font size" group="" name="header_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="center; inherit" defaultvalue="inherit" desc="table header cell align horizontal" group="" name="header_text_horizontal" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="center; inherit" defaultvalue="center" desc="table header cell align vertical" group="" name="header_text_vertical" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="20" desc="table row height" group="" name="row_height" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table row font size" group="" name="row_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table detail font size" group="" name="detail_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table footer font size" group="" name="footer_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <!-- ... font ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvBorderColor" desc="global border colors" group="Appearance" name="globalBorderColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor" desc="global fill colors" group="Appearance" name="globalFillColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFontColor" desc="global font colors" group="Appearance" name="globalFontColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="global symbol colors" group="Appearance" name="globalSymbolColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvInactiveColor" desc="global inactive colors" group="Appearance" name="globalInactiveColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvObjectDisplays.Tables.ColorConfig" desc="global table colors" group="Appearance" name="globalColorConfig" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="atviseTheme" desc="custom theme" group="Appearance" name="theme_class" valuetype="string"/> <!-- ... options ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="columns reorderable" group="Options" name="columnReorder" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="paging" group="Options" name="paging" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="filter bar enabled" group="Options" name="filterBar" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter regular expressions" group="Options" name="filterRegExp" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter use placeholder" group="Options" name="filterStar" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter case sensitive" group="Options" name="filterCaseSensitive" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="1" desc="filter minimum length" group="Options" name="filterLength" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="1000" desc="filter delay [ms]" group="Options" name="filterDelay" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show runtime mode" group="Options" name="showMode" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="multiselect" group="Options" name="multiselect" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="multiselect on cell click" group="Options" name="multicellselect" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="cell linebreak" group="Options" name="linebreak" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="allow direct input" group="Options" name="allowDirectInput" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Standard.keyboard.keyboard" desc="keyboard display" group="Options" name="keyboard" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Standard.dialogs.message_board" desc="message board" group="Options" name="messageBoard" valuetype="display"/> <!-- menu --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenu" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="250" desc="menu width" group="Menu options" name="showMenuWidth" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="300" desc="menu height" group="Menu options" name="showMenuHeight" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show picker menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuPicker" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show filter menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuFilter" substitute="" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show export menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuExport" valuetype="bool"/> <!-- footer --> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol first page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-fast-backward"/>" name="fas_first_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol previous page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-step-backward"/>" name="fas_previous_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol pause" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-pause"></i>" name="fas_pause_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol stop page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-stop"/>" name="fas_stop_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol next page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-step-forward"/>" name="fas_next_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol last page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-fast-forward"/>" name="fas_last_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol load page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-download"/>" name="fas_load_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol search" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-search"/>" name="fas_search_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol truncate" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-ban"></i>" name="fas_truncate_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol triggered" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-angle-double-down"></i>" name="fas_triggered_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol continue" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-cog fa-spin"></i>" name="fas_continue_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol live" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-sync fa-spin"></i>" name="fas_live_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol done" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-check"></i>" name="fas_done_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol manually" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-download"></i>" name="fas_manually_icon"/> <!-- ... ende options ... --> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="false" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <svg atv:refpx="319.992" atv:refpy="307.029" height="580" id="id_1" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1.0586,0,0)" width="640" x="0" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Standard.slickgrid.table_panel" y="0"> <atv:argument name="tableID" prefix="tableID"/> <atv:argument name="header_height" prefix="header_height"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_size" prefix="header_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="row_height" prefix="row_height"/> <atv:argument name="row_text_size" prefix="row_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_horizontal" prefix="header_text_horizontal"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_vertical" prefix="header_text_vertical"/> <atv:argument name="detail_text_size" prefix="detail_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="footer_text_size" prefix="footer_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="font_family" prefix="font_family"/> <atv:argument name="globalBorderColor" prefix="globalBorderColor"/> <atv:argument name="theme_class" prefix="theme_class"/> <atv:argument name="globalFillColor" prefix="globalFillColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalFontColor" prefix="globalFontColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalSymbolColor" prefix="globalSymbolColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalSymbolColor" prefix="paging"/> <atv:argument name="filterBar" prefix="filterBar"/> <atv:argument name="filterRegExp" prefix="filterRegExp"/> <atv:argument name="filterStar" prefix="filterStar"/> <atv:argument name="filterCaseSensitive" prefix="filterCaseSensitive"/> <atv:argument name="filterLength" prefix="filterLength"/> <atv:argument name="filterDelay" prefix="filterDelay"/> <atv:argument name="linebreak" prefix="linebreak"/> <atv:argument name="multiselect" prefix="multiselect"/> <atv:argument name="multicellselect" prefix="multicellselect"/> <atv:argument name="showMenu" prefix="showMenu"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuWidth" prefix="showMenuWidth"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuHeight" prefix="showMenuHeight"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuPicker" prefix="showMenuPicker"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuFilter" prefix="showMenuFilter"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuExport" prefix="showMenuExport"/> <atv:argument name="allowDirectInput" prefix="allowDirectInput"/> <atv:argument name="keyboard" prefix="keyboard"/> <atv:argument name="messageBoard" prefix="messageBoard"/> <atv:overwrite height="565" id="id_1" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1.0265,0,0)"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="320" atv:refpy="627.5" height="25" id="id_2" width="640" x="0" <atv:argument name="fas_next_page" prefix="fas_next_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_last_page" prefix="fas_last_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_load_page" prefix="fas_load_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_search_page" prefix="fas_search_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_truncate_icon" prefix="fas_truncate_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_triggered_icon" prefix="fas_triggered_icon"/> <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>Enables SVG keyboard for the HTML table.</desc> <title>SVG Keyboard (table extension)</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="font size" group="Appearance" name="font_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="font color" group="Appearance" name="color" substitute="$COLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="allow direct input" group="Options" name="allowDirectInput" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.keyboard.keyboard" desc="keyboard display" group="Options" name="keyboard" valuetype="address"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="5" width="5"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="1" width="1"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="40" atv:refpy="13" fill="#ffffff" height="18" id="id_8" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1" width="78" x="1" y="1"/> <text atv:refpx="47.98" atv:refpy="7.652" fill="$COLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_9" transform="matrix(0.9545,0,0,0.7826,0.7497,0.2174)" x="20.477" y="17">T{Keyboard}</text> <circle atv:refpx="12.189" atv:refpy="14.605" cx="10" cy="10" fill="none" id="id_1" r="6.478" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-width="1.044"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="16.76" fill="$COLOR$" height="2.147" id="id_3" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="12"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="13.973" fill="$COLOR$" height="6" id="id_4" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="5"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.DISPLAYSCRIPTS.slickgrid.table_keyboard" atv:name="table_keyboard" atv:type="text/ecmascript"/> <script atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>Notification for HTML based table.</desc> <title>Button Table Notification</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="font size" group="Appearance" name="font_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="font color" name="color" substitute="$COLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Standard.dialogs.message_board" desc="message board" group="Options" name="messageBoard" valuetype="display"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="5" width="5"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="1" width="1"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="40" atv:refpy="13" fill="#ffffff" height="18" id="id_8" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1" width="78" x="1" y="1"/> <text atv:refpx="47.98" atv:refpy="7.652" fill="$COLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" id="id_9" transform="matrix(0.9545,0,0,0.7826,0.7273,0.2174)" x="20.5" y="17">T{Notification}</text> <circle atv:refpx="12.189" atv:refpy="14.605" cx="10" cy="10" fill="none" id="id_1" r="6.478" stroke="$COLOR$" stroke-width="1.044"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="16.76" fill="$COLOR$" height="2.147" id="id_3" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="12"/> <rect atv:refpx="24.814" atv:refpy="13.973" fill="$COLOR$" height="6" id="id_4" stroke="none" stroke-width="1.044" width="2.147" x="9" y="5"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.DISPLAYSCRIPTS.slickgrid.table_notification" atv:name="table_notification" atv:type="text/ecmascript"/> <script atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="640" version="1.2" width="640" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>HTML based table with footer.</desc> <title>Table</title> <metadata> <!-- ... mandatorys ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="30" desc="table header height" group="" name="header_height" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="14" desc="table header font size" group="" name="header_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="center; inherit" defaultvalue="inherit" desc="table header cell align horizontal" group="" name="header_text_horizontal" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="center; inherit" defaultvalue="center" desc="table header cell align vertical" group="" name="header_text_vertical" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="20" desc="table row height" group="" name="row_height" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table row font size" group="" name="row_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table detail font size" group="" name="detail_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="12" desc="table footer font size" group="" name="footer_text_size" valuetype="number"/> <!-- ... font ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" group="Appearance" name="font_family" valuetype="enum"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvBorderColor" desc="global border colors" group="Appearance" name="globalBorderColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor" desc="global fill colors" group="Appearance" name="globalFillColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFontColor" desc="global font colors" group="Appearance" name="globalFontColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="global symbol colors" group="Appearance" name="globalSymbolColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvInactiveColor" desc="global inactive colors" group="Appearance" name="globalInactiveColor" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvObjectDisplays.Tables.ColorConfig" desc="global table colors" group="Appearance" name="globalColorConfig" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="atviseTheme" desc="custom theme" group="Appearance" name="theme_class" valuetype="string"/> <!-- ... options ... --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="columns reorderable" group="Options" name="columnReorder" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="paging" group="Options" name="paging" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="filter bar enabled" group="Options" name="filterBar" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter regular expressions" group="Options" name="filterRegExp" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter use placeholder" group="Options" name="filterStar" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="filter case sensitive" group="Options" name="filterCaseSensitive" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="1" desc="filter minimum length" group="Options" name="filterLength" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="1000" desc="filter delay [ms]" group="Options" name="filterDelay" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show runtime mode" group="Options" name="showMode" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="multiselect" group="Options" name="multiselect" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="multiselect on cell click" group="Options" name="multicellselect" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="false" desc="cell linebreak" group="Options" name="linebreak" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="allow direct input" group="Options" name="allowDirectInput" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Steelblue.keyboard.keyboard" desc="keyboard display" group="Options" name="keyboard" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Steelblue.dialogs.message_board" desc="message board" group="Options" name="messageBoard" valuetype="display"/> <!-- menu --> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenu" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="250" desc="menu width" group="Menu options" name="showMenuWidth" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="300" desc="menu height" group="Menu options" name="showMenuHeight" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show picker menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuPicker" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show filter menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuFilter" substitute="" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show export menu" group="Menu options" name="showMenuExport" valuetype="bool"/> <!-- footer --> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol first page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-fast-backward"/>" name="fas_first_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol previous page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-step-backward"/>" name="fas_previous_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol pause" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-pause"></i>" name="fas_pause_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol stop page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-stop"/>" name="fas_stop_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol next page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-step-forward"/>" name="fas_next_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol last page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-fast-forward"/>" name="fas_last_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol load page" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-download"/>" name="fas_load_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol search" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-search"/>" name="fas_search_page"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol truncate" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-ban"></i>" name="fas_truncate_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol triggered" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-angle-double-down"></i>" name="fas_triggered_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol continue" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-cog fa-spin"></i>" name="fas_continue_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol live" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-sync fa-spin"></i>" name="fas_live_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol done" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-check"></i>" name="fas_done_icon"/> <atv:parameter valuetype="string" group="Footer options" behavior="optional" desc="symbol manually" defaultvalue="<i class="fas fa-download"></i>" name="fas_manually_icon"/> <!-- ... ende options ... --> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="false" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <svg atv:refpx="319.992" atv:refpy="307.029" height="580" id="id_1" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1.0586,0,0)" width="640" x="0" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Steelblue.slickgrid.table_panel" y="0"> <atv:argument name="tableID" prefix="tableID"/> <atv:argument name="header_height" prefix="header_height"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_size" prefix="header_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="row_height" prefix="row_height"/> <atv:argument name="row_text_size" prefix="row_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_horizontal" prefix="header_text_horizontal"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_vertical" prefix="header_text_vertical"/> <atv:argument name="detail_text_size" prefix="detail_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="footer_text_size" prefix="footer_text_size"/> <atv:argument name="font_family" prefix="font_family"/> <atv:argument name="globalBorderColor" prefix="globalBorderColor"/> <atv:argument name="theme_class" prefix="theme_class"/> <atv:argument name="globalFillColor" prefix="globalFillColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalFontColor" prefix="globalFontColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalSymbolColor" prefix="globalSymbolColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalSymbolColor" prefix="globalInactiveColor"/> <atv:argument name="globalColorConfig" prefix="globalColorConfig"/> <atv:argument name="columnReorder" prefix="columnReorder"/> <atv:argument name="paging" prefix="paging"/> <atv:argument name="filterBar" prefix="filterBar"/> <atv:argument name="filterRegExp" prefix="filterRegExp"/> <atv:argument name="filterStar" prefix="filterStar"/> <atv:argument name="filterCaseSensitive" prefix="filterCaseSensitive"/> <atv:argument name="filterLength" prefix="filterLength"/> <atv:argument name="filterDelay" prefix="filterDelay"/> <atv:argument name="linebreak" prefix="linebreak"/> <atv:argument name="multiselect" prefix="multiselect"/> <atv:argument name="multicellselect" prefix="multicellselect"/> <atv:argument name="showMenu" prefix="showMenu"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuWidth" prefix="showMenuWidth"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuHeight" prefix="showMenuHeight"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuPicker" prefix="showMenuPicker"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuFilter" prefix="showMenuFilter"/> <atv:argument name="showMenuExport" prefix="showMenuExport"/> <atv:argument name="allowDirectInput" prefix="allowDirectInput"/> <atv:argument name="keyboard" prefix="keyboard"/> <atv:argument name="messageBoard" prefix="messageBoard"/> <atv:overwrite height="565" id="id_1" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1.0265,0,0)"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="320" atv:refpy="627.5" height="25" id="id_2" width="640" x="0" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.slickgrid.table_footer" y="615"> <atv:argument name="tableID" prefix="tableID"/> <atv:argument name="fas_first_page" prefix="fas_first_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_previous_page" prefix="fas_previous_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_pause_page" prefix="fas_pause_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_stop_page" prefix="fas_stop_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_next_page" prefix="fas_next_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_last_page" prefix="fas_last_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_load_page" prefix="fas_load_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_search_page" prefix="fas_search_page"/> <atv:argument name="fas_truncate_icon" prefix="fas_truncate_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_triggered_icon" prefix="fas_triggered_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_continue_icon" prefix="fas_continue_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_live_icon" prefix="fas_live_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_done_icon" prefix="fas_done_icon"/> <atv:argument name="fas_manually_icon" prefix="fas_manually_icon"/> </svg> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"/> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="20" version="1.2" width="80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" defaultvalue="atvise_table_1" desc="table ID" name="tableID" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="Arial;Courier;Tahoma;Verdana" defaultvalue="Arial" desc="font family" behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="font color" name="color" substitute="$COLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional"
